Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Another feature we can make use of to help identify radar echoes (or any contact in game) is interrogation.
All of our units are equipped with radios that can communicate on the standard civilian radio frequencies, used for navigation and safety purposes.
Select our Ka-27PL helicopter, and then hold Ctrl and right click on any radar echo currently spotted and then click 'Identify Yourself'.
